en_title: Stop Killing Games Gains Momentum After Bill Passes California State Assembly Vote
cn_title: 游戏保存运动获新进展 加州议会通过保护法案

paragraphs.en: The Stop Killing Games movement has reached yet another major milestone after a bill protecting games from being pulled offline passed a California State Assembly vote.
paragraphs.cn: 「停止扼杀游戏」运动再迎重大里程碑——一项保护游戏免遭下线的法案刚刚在加州州议会投票中通过。

paragraphs.en: As announced in a video posted by California State Assembly Member Chris Ward on the Stop Killing Games YouTube channel, bill AB-1921, also known as the Protect Our Games Act, has officially passed with a vote of 43-16. A campaign volunteer shared the news in a Reddit post, confirming that it passed with "strong Democratic support and two Republican yes votes," with opposing votes breaking down with one Democrat and 15 Republican votes.
paragraphs.cn: 加州州议会成员Chris Ward在「停止扼杀游戏」YouTube频道发布的视频中宣布，AB-1921法案（又名《保护我们的游戏法案》）已正式以43票赞成、16票反对的结果通过。一位运动志愿者在Reddit帖子中分享了这一消息，确认该法案获得「强劲的民主党支持以及两张共和党赞成票」，反对票来源为1张民主党票与15张共和党票。

paragraphs.en: It marks an important moment for Stop Killing Games, which has backed the bill as part of its ongoing fight for video game preservation.
paragraphs.cn: 对于「停止扼杀游戏」运动而言，这是一个重要时刻——该运动一直将这项法案视为其持续推进游戏保存斗争的一部分。

paragraphs.en: "It's over in the state senate now, and we're going to be able to debate that in committee in the month of June," Ward said. "The idea came to be from a constituent in San Diego who is tired of seeing their game shut down after recent purchases. So, if you live in California, be sure to contact your state senator and tell them as a gamer or developer why you care and this matters to you. We're fighting for your consumer protection and making sure that you have a full right and enjoyment to these games."
paragraphs.cn: Ward表示：「现在法案已提交州参议院，我们将能在6月份的委员会中就此展开辩论。这个想法最初来自圣地亚哥的一位选民，他厌倦了看到自己刚买的游戏就被关服。所以，如果你住在加州，请务必联系你的州参议员，以玩家或开发者的身份告诉他们为什么你在意这件事、为什么这对你很重要。我们正在为你的消费者权益而战，确保你对这些游戏享有完整的权利与乐趣。」

paragraphs.en: As detailed by Stop Killing Games, the bill AB-1921 would require game companies to provide 60 days' notice before shutting down support for server-dependent games and then either offer a method for owners to play affected games afterwards or provide refunds. The former could be achieved through community servers or offline access of some kind.
paragraphs.cn: 根据「停止扼杀游戏」运动的详细说明，AB-1921法案将要求游戏公司在关闭依赖服务器的游戏支持之前提前60天通知，随后要么为拥有者提供继续游玩受影响游戏的方法，要么提供退款。前者可通过社区服务器或某种形式的离线访问实现。

paragraphs.en: These ideas are nothing new for Stop Killing Games. YouTuber Ross Scott began the consumer movement in April 2024 in the wake of the news that Ubisoft would delist and pull its open-world racing game, The Crew, offline, leaving owners without access. The goal of the movement is to keep games, good and bad, alive in an industry that has signaled a trend toward keeping players from accessing experiences. Recent examples include Concord, Anthem, and Highguard.
paragraphs.cn: 这些想法对「停止扼杀游戏」运动而言并不新鲜。2024年4月，YouTuber Ross Scott在得知育碧将下架其开放世界赛车游戏《飙酷车神》（The Crew）并关闭服务器、令拥有者无法继续游玩的消息后，发起了这场消费者运动。该运动的目标是在一个已显露出阻止玩家获取体验趋势的产业中，让游戏——无论好坏——得以延续。最近的例子包括《星鸣特攻》（Concord）、《圣歌》（Anthem）和《Highguard》。

paragraphs.en: Stop Killing Games' European Citizens' initiative reached 1 million unverified signatures back in July 2025 and went on to secure 1.3 million signatures in January of this year. European politicians debated its goals for game preservation earlier this month and expected to deliver a reply in the coming weeks.
paragraphs.cn: 「停止扼杀游戏」的欧洲公民倡议早在2025年7月就达到了100万个未经验证的签名，并在今年1月获得了130万个签名。欧洲政客在本月早些时候对其游戏保存目标进行了辩论，预计将在未来几周内给出答复。

paragraphs.en: As explained by Ward, there is much work to be done before Stop Killing Games achieves its goal to keep games running after a publisher tries to pull the plug. Meanwhile, Sony recently announced it would delist and shut down PlayStation 5 title Destruction AllStars. Publisher 2K announced it would delist and shut down online functionality for Lego 2K Drive a few weeks ago.
paragraphs.cn: 正如Ward所解释的，在「停止扼杀游戏」实现其「在发行商试图拔掉插头后让游戏继续运行」的目标之前，还有大量工作要做。与此同时，索尼最近宣布将下架并关闭PlayStation 5游戏《破坏全明星》（Destruction AllStars）。发行商2K也在几周前宣布将下架《乐高2K竞速》并关闭其在线功能。

paragraphs.en: Michael Cripe is a freelance writer with IGN. He's best known for his work at sites like The Pitch, The Escapist, and OnlySP. Be sure to give him a follow on Bluesky (@mikecripe.bsky.social) and Twitter (@MikeCripe).
paragraphs.cn: Michael Cripe是IGN的自由撰稿人，以在The Pitch、The Escapist和OnlySP等网站的作品闻名。欢迎在Bluesky（@mikecripe.bsky.social）和Twitter（@MikeCripe）上关注他。
